name: Pumpkin Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup raisins (could substitute chopped dates, but raisins are better)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine pumpkin, sugar, butter, water, and eggs. Beat for 1 minute at medium speed.
2. Mix dry ingredients together and then add to pumpkin mixture. Beat for another minute at medium speed.
3. Stir in the raisins and pecans.
4. Pour into 2 greased 8x4-inch or 9x5-inch loaf pans.
5. Bake at 325°F for 50 to 60 minutes, until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean.
6. Cool in pans for about 5 minutes, then turn out onto a wire rack to finish cooling.
